0.name: Prof. Candice
0.text: Today, we move on towards the third and last Law of Motion.

2.name: Prof. Candice
2.text: "Every action has an equal and opposite reaction."

3.name: Colin
3.text: So you're saying, if I hit the wall, the wall will hit me back?

5.name: Prof. Candice
5.text: Here, try it on this box

6.name: Prof. Candice
6.text: Try pushing it lightly, and then with full force.

7.name: Colin
7.text: ( Does this game ever run out of boxes? )
